title: Paginate Rows with Cursor Tokens in MySQL
summary: Return the next stable page of rows in MySQL with keyset pagination on created_at and item_id.
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify next-page retrieval, page size limits, tie-breaking on item_id, partial pages, and empty results after the cursor.
